name: t-doc
paperTitle: T-Doc: Transformer-based Document-level Parsing on OCR Outputs
content:
## Introduction

Transformer attends to both text tokens and spatial relationships, handling layout-dependent parsing tasks. This approach enables practical implementation of advanced techniques without extensive theoretical background.

## Core Concept

Transformer attends to both text tokens and spatial relationships, handling layout-dependent parsing tasks.

## Architecture Overview

```
Input
  │
  ├─→ [Processing Stage 1]
  │   └─ Main computation
  │
  ├─→ [Processing Stage 2]
  │   └─ Refinement
  │
  └─→ Output
```
